== Notes for [[Item:Q57381|Q57381]] ==

Practiced medicine first at Reggio (Calabria), then at Venice. In 1507, he invited his brother Judah Leon to join him and his father in Venice.

Alternate dates to check: b. 1473 , d. 1532

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADB955DC1EFBBFA9822EF79916CD7CF
geni:6000000009888725106

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
